'''Bakura-5''', also known simply as '''Planet 5''',<ref name="TAB-SB">''[[The Truce at Bakura Sourcebook]]''</ref> was a barren [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Bakura system/Legends|Bakura system]].<ref name="TEA" />
